caption: In a professional setting, three people wearing medical scrubs and masks are seated side-by-side in front of a large digital screen. The person on the left wears blue scrubs and a blue surgical cap, the person in the middle wears blue scrubs under a gray jacket, and the person on the right wears pink scrubs and a colorful surgical cap. Each individual holds a white piece of paper in their lap. The screen behind them displays a menu with text, including the phrases "Simulation Setup System" and "Enter the simulation on this PC if you want to start." A "Sim Week" logo is visible in the bottom right corner of the image. Across the sequence of frames, the people remain seated and relatively still, though there are slight shifts in their posture and the way they hold their papers as they look toward the screen.
